hero.title:
GxP Auditing
Services
hero.subtitle: Independent, risk-based GxP audits across pharmacovigilance, clinical, laboratory, manufacturing, and computerized system domains — delivered by experienced auditors worldwide.

overview.heading: GxP Auditing Services
overview.p1: PVCON provides independent, risk-based GxP audits to evaluate compliance maturity across Pharma companies, CROs, CMOs, laboratories, vendors, and strategic partners.
overview.p2: Our auditors combine technical expertise and regulatory insight to deliver focused assessments that strengthen governance, mitigate risk, and support inspection readiness across the product lifecycle.

pv-audits.title: PV Audits
pv-audits.description: PV audits assess the effectiveness of pharmacovigilance systems and ensure compliance with global safety regulations.
bullets: Global / Local PV Service Provider audits
Risk-based audit planning and strategy support

gcp-audits.title: GCP Audits
gcp-audits.description: GCP audits safeguard clinical trial integrity and patient safety by verifying compliance with regulatory requirements, ethical standards, and approved study protocols.
bullets: Phase I clinical study audits, including BA/BE studies
Phase II to IV clinical study audits
Document audits: protocols, ICF, IB, CRF, CSRs, PSURs, DSURs, ISS/ISE
Clinical Database, Data Management & Biostatistics audits
Vendor Qualification audits & FDA/EMA Mock Inspections
Review of complete Trial Master Files (TMF) for regulatory submission

other-gxp-audits.title: Other GxP Audits
other-gxp-audits.description: Specialized GxP audits across laboratory, manufacturing, distribution, and computerized system domains — ensuring end-to-end lifecycle compliance.

whyPvcon.heading: Why Choose PVCON for GxP Audits?

01.title: Experienced Auditors
01.description: Our auditors average 15+ years of hands-on regulatory audit experience across multiple GxP disciplines and geographic regions.

02.title: Global Coverage
02.description: We conduct audits across 102 countries, leveraging local regulatory knowledge and cultural awareness to deliver contextually relevant findings.

03.title: Actionable Outcomes
03.description: Every audit concludes with prioritized, practical recommendations and CAPA guidance — not just observations, but a clear path to compliance.

hero.title:
Pharmacovigilance
Consulting

overview.heading: Pharmacovigilance Consulting
overview.p1: PVCON supports pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device companies in building, strengthening, and maintaining compliant pharmacovigilance systems.
overview.p2: Our consulting services ensure regulatory alignment, operational efficiency, and inspection readiness across global markets.

pv-qms.title: PV Quality Management System (PV QMS)
pv-qms.description: Helping and facilitating small & mid-size Pharma companies in semi & regulated geographies to set up PV function from scratch or scale up existing rudimentary PV systems.
bullets: Developing Standard Operating Procedures & Work Instructions
Establishing Quality policies and Governance frameworks
Periodic system reviews and continuous improvement
Safety Data Exchange Agreements (SDEA) / Pharmacovigilance Agreements (PVA) development and review

audit-inspection-readiness.title: Audit Planning & Inspection Readiness
audit-inspection-readiness.description: We help organizations maintain continuous inspection readiness through structured governance and risk-based oversight.

local-qppv-pvoi.title: Local QPPV / PvOI Services
local-qppv-pvoi.description: PVCON provides Pharmacovigilance Officer In-charge (PvOI) services to ensure compliance with CDSCO requirements.
bullets: Acting as a single point of contact to the Regulator for all drug safety related queries for client products
Review & maintenance of PV Master File (PvMF) with complete Annexures in compliance with local regulations
Oversight of PV compliance and reporting
Ensuring timely submission of ICSR and aggregate reports
Regulatory coordination with CDSCO and PvPI

regulatory-intelligence.title: Regulatory Intelligence
regulatory-intelligence.description: Our regulatory intelligence services help organizations anticipate regulatory changes and maintain global compliance.

whyPvcon.heading: Why Choose PVCON for PV Consulting?

01.title: Embedded Partnership

psmf.title: PSMF Manager
psmf.description: AI-powered SaaS platform for end-to-end PSMF compliance — automated generation, version control, and always audit-ready.

hero.title:
PSMF
Manager
hero.subtitle: AI-powered end-to-end solution for Pharmacovigilance System Master File compliance. From version control to automated document generation — everything you need to streamline your PSMF lifecycle.

overview.heading: AI-Powered PSMF Management
overview.p1: PSMF Manager is a web-based, fully automated SaaS platform built by PVCON to transform how pharmaceutical companies manage their Pharmacovigilance System Master File. Powered by AI, the platform simplifies complex compliance reviews with transparency and reliability — eliminating manual errors and keeping your PSMF always inspection-ready.
overview.p2: Whether you manage a single local PSMF or coordinate global and local files across multiple regions, PSMF Manager provides real-time coordination, automated change tracking, and instant regulatory-compliant PDF generation — all in one secure, cloud-based platform.

features.heading: Everything You Need for PSMF Compliance

01.title: AI-Driven Compliance Review
01.description: Leverage artificial intelligence to simplify complex pharmacovigilance reviews. Our AI engine identifies gaps, suggests improvements, and ensures your PSMF meets all regulatory requirements with transparency and reliability.

02.title: Global & Local PSMF Management
02.description: Manage global and local PSMF versions from a single platform with real-time coordination. Eliminate redundancies, maintain consistency across regions, and ensure every version is aligned with both corporate and local regulatory requirements.

03.title: Full Version History & Audit Trail
03.description: Every change is time-stamped and securely logged with comprehensive audit trails. Maintain complete version history that demonstrates regulatory compliance and ensures you are always prepared for inspections.

04.title: Automated Tracked Changes
04.description: The platform automatically highlights every modification, reducing manual review effort significantly. Your team can instantly see what changed, when, and by whom — streamlining the review and approval process.

05.title: External Data Integration
05.description: Seamlessly sync with leading pharmacovigilance databases and enterprise systems. PSMF Manager integrates with your existing infrastructure to pull data automatically, eliminating duplicate data entry and reducing human error.

06.title: Automated PSMF Document Generation
06.description: Generate regulatory-compliant PSMF documents in PDF format instantly with a single click. No more manual formatting or version confusion — the platform produces audit-ready documents that meet EMA, MHRA, and global regulatory standards.

01.title: EMA GVP Module II
01.description: Full alignment with European Medicines Agency Good Pharmacovigilance Practice requirements.

02.title: US FDA 21 CFR Part 11
02.description: Compliant with FDA electronic records and electronic signatures regulations.

03.title: EU GMP Annex 11
03.description: Meets EU Good Manufacturing Practice computerised systems requirements.

04.title: GAMP 5
04.description: Validated per ISPE GAMP 5 risk-based approach to compliant GxP computerized systems.

01.title: Two-Factor Authentication
01.description: Robust 2FA with password controls protecting every user session.

02.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
02.description: All data transmitted via industry-standard encrypted channels.

03.title: AWS Cloud Backup
03.description: Automatic backup protection on secure AWS cloud infrastructure.

04.title: Comprehensive Audit Trails
04.description: Every user action logged and traceable for full accountability.

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your PSMF Management?
cta.text: Experience the future of PSMF compliance with PVCON's AI-powered platform. Request a demo to see PSMF Manager in action.
